attributes.description: Overview of OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise conversation messages collected from the OpenAI Compliance Logs Platform.

params.markdown:
#### OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise

**Conversation Messages**

This dashboard provides visibility into ChatGPT Enterprise conversation messages collected from the OpenAI Compliance Logs Platform. It highlights total messages and unique users, message volume over time by author, and breakdowns by author type, client surface, model, and content type. It also surfaces the most active conversations, users, and assistant tools. Use the controls above to filter by user, author type, and model.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/openai_chatgpt_enterprise/overview)**

attributes.title: [Logs OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise] Conversation Messages
